name: Blue Cheese Toasts with Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven or broiler.
2. Cream together the cheese and butter. Add cognac if using, season with pepper, and stir in the chopped walnuts.
3. Toast the bread lightly on both sides.
4. Spread the cheese mixture over each toast.
5. Return the toasts to the oven or broiler for just long enough for the butter and cheese to soften slightly, not completely melt.
6. Remove from heat, dust with additional pepper, cut into smaller pieces, and serve warm.
7. Serve alongside a salad of finely shredded bitter greens (radicchio, butter lettuce, endive) dressed with walnut oil vinaigrette. A cool, juicy pear would complement the cheese and walnuts well.
